extortion.description: [AI generated] Bechtel Corporation is a global engineering, construction and project management company. It operates in various sectors including infrastructure, nuclear, security, environmental clean-up, oil, gas and chemicals, mining and metals. Founded in 1898, the US-based company is one of the most respected in its field, with projects in more than 160 countries. Bechtel provides design, management, procurement and construction services and is privately held.
